title: 404 error on fresh Docker installation
symptom: After a fresh installation of n8n on Docker, accessing the page results in a 404 error.
not_this_if: The page loads correctly after installation
root_cause: The 404 error typically occurs when the n8n application cannot find the expected files or directories due to incorrect path configurations in the Docker setup. This can happen if the data folder is not correctly mapped to the expected location within the container.
fix_steps: Open the docker-compose file used for the n8n installation.
Restart the Docker container to apply the changes.
If the issue persists, run 'chmod 777 -R ~/.n8n' to adjust permissions.
agent_instruction: Modify the docker-compose file to change the n8n data path and restart the container.
